creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to crypt47 from comment #35)
The ipfw bug is fixed in the development branch now, it will be fixed shortly in stable/13 and will be included in 13.0-RELEASE-p3.

I have no idea what the pf nat issue is, comment 32 does not make it clear to me.  Can you show the errors you get when trying to load the pf kernel module?  It sounds like there is some mismatch between the running kernel and the installed kernel modules.  In any case, this is probably best discussed in a separate PR.
